name: AI Logistics Quoting Platform with Carrier Intelligence

parameters.content:
## 📋 AI Freight Quote Comparator

Brokers and freight teams waste hours building rate quotes manually from spreadsheets and carrier emails. This workflow eliminates that — a shipment request comes in and a ranked PDF quote goes out automatically, in minutes.

### How it works
1. A customer submits shipment details (origin, destination, weight, mode) via webhook
2. The workflow simultaneously fetches rates from 3 carrier sheets in Google Sheets
3. GPT-4o normalises the data and builds a ranked HTML comparison table
4. PDFShift converts the HTML to a clean A4 PDF
5. Gmail delivers the quote to the customer as an attachment

### Setup steps
1. Connect your **OpenAI** credential to the GPT-4o node
2. Connect **Google Sheets OAuth2** — your sheet ID is already pre-filled
3. Add your **PDFShift API key** to the Generate Quote PDF node header
4. Connect **Gmail OAuth2** to the Send Quote Email node
5. Click **Test Workflow** — demo shipment data is pinned on the webhook

## 📥 Trigger & Field Extraction
Webhook receives the customer's shipment request. The Set node unpacks body fields into clean named variables used downstream.

Demo data is pinned — hit **Test Workflow** to run without a live HTTP call.

## 🔍 Carrier Rate Lookup
Three Google Sheets reads run in parallel — one per carrier tab. The Merge node waits for all three before passing data forward.

Each tab shares the same spreadsheet; only the sheet name differs per carrier.

## 🤖 AI Quote Generation & PDF
The Code node structures shipment and carrier data into a clean JSON payload. GPT-4o receives this and returns a complete HTML quote page.

PDFShift converts that HTML to an A4 PDF binary, which is passed directly to Gmail.

## 📧 Customer Delivery
Gmail sends the ranked PDF quote to the customer's email address. Subject and body auto-fill from the shipment data.

The quote is valid for 7 days — update the footer prompt in the GPT-4o node if needed.

## 🔐 Credentials & Security
Requires: OpenAI API key, Google Sheets OAuth2, PDFShift API key, Gmail OAuth2.

Do not hardcode API keys. Use n8n credential store. Remove personal emails before sharing this template.

parameters.message:
=

Dear {{ $('Prepare Quote Fields').item.json.customer_name }},

Please find your freight quote attached for your shipment from {{ $('Prepare Quote Fields').item.json.origin }} to {{ $('Prepare Quote Fields').item.json.destination }}.

The PDF contains a ranked comparison from BlueDart, DTDC, and Delhivery — best-value option highlighted in green.

This quote is valid for 7 days. Reply to this email to confirm your booking.

Best regards,
FreightPro Quotation Team
support@freightpro-demo.com | +91-98765-43210
parameters.subject: =Your Freight Quote – {{ $('Prepare Quote Fields').item.json.origin }} to {{ $('Prepare Quote Fields').item.json.destination }}

parameters.content:
## ⚠️ Error Handler
Catches any failure in the workflow and posts a Slack alert. Wire the error output of critical nodes here to prevent silent failures going unnoticed.
